allies.rationale_text: Game-theory-payoffs provides the payoff structure that makes nash-equilibrium a practical response model instead of pure abstraction.
allies.source_quote: Game theory itself is considered a powerful tool

allies.rationale_text: Decision-trees help nash-equilibrium lay out strategic branches and countermoves clearly enough to inspect.
allies.source_quote: setting these scenarios out in a logic tree

structured_tensions.tension_text: Nash-equilibrium conflicts with prisoners-dilemma when individually rational play converges on a collectively worse steady state.
Nash-equilibrium conflicts with moral-hazard when visible incentives let players settle into stable but socially damaging behavior.
Nash-equilibrium conflicts with confirmation-bias when analysts model payoffs to confirm a preferred equilibrium instead of mapping the game honestly.
